metadata.description: Personal collection of Claude Code skills, each packaged as its own installable plugin.

plugins.name: code-to-business
plugins.description: Analyzes a codebase and produces a jargon-free descriptive text for non-technical teams (management, product, sales, support).

plugins.name: ask-me
plugins.description: Interview the user relentlessly about a plan or design until reaching shared understanding, resolving each branch of the decision tree, then produce an updated plan incorporating every decision.

plugins.name: clean-code
plugins.description: Write, refactor, and review readable, maintainable code in any programming language through disciplined naming, small single-purpose functions, comment discipline, clean error handling, and clean tests.

plugins.name: brainstorming
plugins.description: Divergent exploration to find the right idea for creative or architectural work — feature design, new components, API shape, refactors, behavioral changes. Reframe the real need, generate many genuinely different paths from the requirement, pressure-test them, and surface the ones that survive.
